summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TILAWA Iteration 2 features - Dashboard, Enhanced Tajweed Hub, Quiz engine, Rule details, and Session enhancements. All backend APIs and frontend pages working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Enhanced Tajweed Rules API (9 rules with categories, overview, practice_tips)
Backend: Individual Rule Detail API (ikhfa, idgham, iqlab, qalqalah)
Backend: Dashboard Stats API (streak_days, xp_total, average_score, rules_mastered)
Backend: Quiz Questions API (8 questions without correct answers)
Backend: Quiz Submission API (score, percentage, xp_earned, results with explanations)
Frontend: Dashboard page loads with streak card, XP card, accuracy card
Frontend: Dashboard quick action buttons navigate correctly
Frontend: Tajweed Hub shows category tabs (All, Noon Sakinah, Meem Sakinah, Madd Rules, Qalqalah)
Frontend: Enhanced Tajweed rules display with 9 rules and enhanced fields
Frontend: Tajweed Rule Detail pages show overview, example, practice tip
Frontend: Tajweed Quiz loads with questions, multiple choice, progress bar
Frontend: Tajweed Session page loads with verse and recording interface
Frontend: Navigation from sidebar Dashboard link works
Frontend: All new pages render without errors
Integration: Dashboard stats API properly integrated with frontend
Integration: Quiz engine fully functional end-to-end
Integration: Rule details properly linked from hub to detail pages
